class.name: GDKAchievement
class.description: Read-only wrapper around a cached Xbox achievement. Retrieved from [method GDKAchievements.get_cached_achievements].

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the display name of the achievement.

method.name: get_service_configuration_id
method.description: Returns the service configuration ID (SCID) associated with this achievement.

method.name: get_progress_state
method.description: Returns the progress state as a string (e.g., "Achieved", "NotStarted", "InProgress").

method.name: is_unlocked
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the achievement has been unlocked.

method.name: is_secret
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the achievement is a secret achievement.

method.name: get_locked_description
method.description: Returns the description shown when the achievement is locked.

method.name: get_unlocked_description
method.description: Returns the description shown when the achievement is unlocked.

members.member: The display name of the achievement.
The service configuration ID (SCID) associated with this achievement.
The progress state as a string.
[code]true[/code] if the achievement has been unlocked.
[code]true[/code] if the achievement is a secret achievement.
The description shown when the achievement is locked.
The description shown when the achievement is unlocked.
